## Summary

<!--
Briefly describe what this PR does and why.
Example: "Adds async support to the Researcher agent to improve concurrent RAG retrieval performance."
-->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test improvement

<!--
Describe the specific changes in detail.

- Key implementation decisions?
-->

## Testing

<!--
Describe how you tested these changes.
-->

- [ ] `make check` passes (Ruff lint + format + mypy + ty)
- [ ] `make test` passes (all tests green, no coverage regressions)
- [ ] Manual testing completed (describe below)

**Manual testing notes:**
<!-- If applicable, describe any manual testing performed -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style guidelines (`make check` passes)
- [ ] Self-review completed - I have reviewed my own code
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Type annotations added where required
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public API or configuration changed)
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` steps followed for new agents (if applicable)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] All CI checks pass
